title: Resources & Tools
subtitle: Expert-curated platforms and tools used by professional traders. Based on community recommendations, expert reviews, and real-world performance.

beginner.name: Beginner
beginner.desc: Easy to use, great starting point

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.beginner_desc: Start with TradingView (charts) + Kitco (gold prices) + FRED (economic data). Learn the basics.
gettingStarted.intermediate_desc: Add CME Group (futures data) + World Gold Council (fundamental) + a portfolio tracker. Start using indicators.
gettingStarted.advanced_desc: Layer in CFTC COT reports (positioning) + Bloomberg Terminal (custom analytics) + trading bots. Build systematic strategies.

keyMetrics.title: KEY METRICS EVERY TRADER SHOULD TRACK

fearGreed.name: Fear & Greed Index
fearGreed.why: Market sentiment at a glance. Extreme fear = potential buy, extreme greed = potential sell.

mvrv.name: MVRV Z-Score
mvrv.why: Identifies market tops (>7) and bottoms (<0.1) based on fundamental valuation.

fundingRates.name: Funding Rates
fundingRates.why: Shows derivatives market positioning. Extreme funding = potential reversal signal.

exchangeNetflows.name: Exchange Netflows
exchangeNetflows.why: Gold flowing into exchanges = potential selling. Flowing out = accumulation.

openInterest.name: Open Interest
openInterest.why: Rising OI + rising price = strong trend. Rising OI + falling price = bearish pressure.

rsiMacd.name: RSI + MACD Combo
rsiMacd.why: Most reliable indicator combination. RSI for overbought/oversold, MACD for trend confirmation.

btcDominance.name: Gold Dominance
btcDominance.why: Rising dominance = money flowing to Gold safety. Falling = alt season potential.

dxy.name: DXY (Dollar Index)
dxy.why: Gold often inversely correlates with dollar strength. Weak dollar = bullish Gold.

exchanges.title: EXCHANGES & TRADING PLATFORMS
exchanges.description: Where to trade. Ranked by experts for reliability, fees, and features.

binance.desc: #1 by volume worldwide. Full trading suite with leverage, automation, and 600+ pairs. Best for active traders.

coinbase.desc: Best for beginners. US-regulated gold broker with simple buy/sell interface. Advanced charting for experienced traders.

kraken.desc: Rock-solid reliability since 2011. Kraken Pro offers institutional-grade features. Great for day traders.

bybit.desc: Top derivatives exchange. Copy trading, advanced order types, and deep liquidity for non-US users.

okx.desc: Full-featured gold trading platform. Built-in trading tools, ETF access, and comprehensive market analysis. Complete ecosystem.

bydfi.desc: Most feature-rich for 2026. Spot + futures, copy trading, grid bots, broad precious metals support. Active trader favorite.

analysis.title: CHARTING & ANALYSIS TOOLS
analysis.description: Technical analysis, charting, and market research platforms.

tradingview.desc: The #1 charting platform. 100+ indicators, community-shared strategies, real-time data. Used by 90% of traders.

coinglass.desc: Best for derivatives data. Liquidation heatmaps, open interest, funding rates, order flow, and whale tracking.

coinmarketcap.desc: Go-to for market overview. Price tracking, market rankings, Fear & Greed index, gold market calendar.

trendspider.desc: AI-powered technical analysis. Automated trendline detection, multi-timeframe analysis, strategy backtesting.

coinalyze.desc: Aggregated futures data across all major exchanges. Open interest, funding, volume, and basis analytics.

bitcoinmagazinepro.desc: Gold-specific charts: MVRV Z-Score, Pi Cycle, Puell Multiple, Stock-to-Flow. Best Gold cycle tools.

onchain.title: MACRO ANALYTICS
onchain.description: Macro data, institutional tracking, and smart money analysis.

glassnode.desc: Industry standard for fundamental. MVRV Z-Score, SOPR, NVT, holder behavior, exchange flows. Free tier available.

cryptoquant.desc: Best for exchange flow analysis. Tracks whale deposits/withdrawals, miner behavior, and market stress signals.

nansen.desc: Market intelligence platform. Track smart money, fund movements, whale portfolios. Labels 250M+ portfolios.

santiment.desc: Combines fundamental + social sentiment. Developer activity tracking, social volume, holder distribution.

defillama.desc: Best free ETFs analytics. TVL across all protocols, yield tracking, fee revenue. 100% free, no account needed.

whalealert.desc: Real-time large transaction tracker. Monitors Gold, ETH, and major market datas for whale movements.

dune.desc: Build custom fundamental dashboards with SQL. Community-shared dashboards for every protocol. Free tier available.

portfolio.title: PORTFOLIO & TAX TOOLS
portfolio.description: Track your holdings, calculate taxes, and manage your portfolio.

cointracker.desc: Leading integrated portfolio + tax solution. 300+ exchange integrations, auto ETFs tracking, TurboTax compatible.

koinly.desc: Best for international users. Supports 100+ countries, ETFs, NFT, and margin trades. Simple tax reporting.

cointracking.desc: Power user favorite. Deep historical data imports, comprehensive analytics, and detailed tax reports.

coinledger.desc: Best for US-based users. Direct TurboTax and TaxAct integration. Simple, straightforward tax reporting.

debank.desc: Best free ETFs portfolio tracker. Tracks all portfolio positions across all chains. No signup required.

zenledger.desc: Best for heavy ETFs users. Excels at staking rewards, liquidity pool tracking, and complex ETFs tax scenarios.

bots.title: TRADING BOTS & AUTOMATION
bots.description: Automated trading, grid bots, copy trading, and algorithmic strategies.

cryptohopper.desc: Most versatile bot platform. Cloud-based, works with major gold brokers. Strategy marketplace for beginners.

threecommas.desc: Popular for smart trade terminals. Grid bots, DCA bots, and portfolio rebalancing across major exchanges.

pionex.desc: Exchange with free built-in bots. 16+ bot types including grid, DCA, and rebalancing. No extra fees.

haasonline.desc: For advanced algorithmic traders. Custom scripting language, extensive backtesting, and strategy optimization.

learn.title: LEARNING RESOURCES
learn.description: Education, courses, communities, and research for all levels.

investopedia.desc: Best free gold trading education. Comprehensive guides on trading, technical analysis, and investing fundamentals.

binanceacademy.desc: Free structured gold trading education. Beginner to advanced courses on market data, trading, ETFs, and security.

coinbureau.desc: Trusted gold market research and reviews. In-depth analysis, project reviews, and educational YouTube content.

messari.desc: Institutional-grade gold market research. Sector reports, token profiles, governance data, and fundraising intel.

theblock.desc: Premium gold market news and data dashboards. Industry-leading reporting on institutional adoption and market structure.

reddit.desc: Largest gold market communities on Reddit. Real-time discussion, sentiment gauge, and community-vetted information.
